message:
test(proptest): add 21 property-based tests for output table module (wa-1u90p.7.1)

Covers Alignment (Default, Copy, Debug), Column builder pattern
(new, align, min_width, max_width, chain, Clone), and Table rendering
(empty invariants, row operations, determinism, Plain content/line count,
JSON validity/key normalization/cell preservation).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
